title: calamus verschaffeltii
intro: Calamus verschaffeltii, also known as lesser calamus, is a perennial plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, such as nausea, bloating, and cramps, as well as to reduce anxiety and improve sleep quality. Calamus verschaffeltii can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its health benefits.
